languages.text: Местные хороши — почему бы не “сдавать их внаем” сомнительным личностям из Пустотного братства. И пускай наемничий кодекс Каликсиды и Коронуса, "Милитис Лекс Легис" поставит это под сомнение, а правила Астра Милитарум вовсе не допускают подобного.

traits.locale_text: Местные хороши — почему бы не “сдавать их внаем” сомнительным личностям из Пустотного братства. И пускай наемничий кодекс Каликсиды и Коронуса, "Милитис Лекс Легис" поставит это под сомнение, а правила Астра Милитарум вовсе не допускают подобного.

languages.text: Простор еще не видал воинов столь искусных и неприхотливых, как сыновья и дочери Заркова. Пираты Пустотного Братства сулят достойно отплатить за возможность нанять зарковцев для исполнения своих черных замыслов. Кто как не помазанни{mf|к|ца} Бога-Императора вол{mf|ен|ьна} попрать законы Империума для выгоды протектората?

traits.locale_text: Из неприхотливых, закаленных зарковцев получатся прекрасные наемники. Можно закрыть глаза на кодекс Астра Милитарум и наемнические законы протектората ради хорошей прибыли.

languages.text: The Expanse has yet to see warriors as skilled and resilient as the sons and daughters of Zarkov. The Fellowship of the Void promises to pay handsomely for the chance to recruit Zarkovians to execute their dark designs. Who else but the God-Emperor's anointed has the power to override the Imperium's laws for the welfare of the protectorate?
languages.original_text: Простор еще не видал воинов столь искусных и неприхотливых, как сыновья и дочери Заркова. Пираты Пустотного Братства сулят достойно отплатить за возможность нанять зарковцев для исполнения своих черных замыслов. Кто как не помазанни{mf|к|ца} Бога-Императора вол{mf|ен|ьна} попрать законы Империума для выгоды протектората?

The Fellowship of the Void promises to pay handsomely for the chance to recruit Zarkovians to execute their dark designs. Who else but the God-Emperor's anointed has the power to override the Imperium's laws for the welfare of the protectorate?

Who else but the God-Emperor's anointed has the power to override the Imperium's laws for the welfare of the protectorate?

The Fellowship of the Void promises to pay handsomely for the chance to recruit Zarkovians to execute their dark designs. Who else but the God-Emperor's anointed has the power to override the Imperium's laws for the welfare of the protectorate?

The Expanse has yet to see warriors as skilled and resilient as the sons and daughters of Zarkov. The Fellowship of the Void promises to pay handsomely for the chance to recruit Zarkovians to execute their dark designs. Who else but the God-Emperor's anointed has the power to override the Imperium's laws for the welfare of the protectorate?

languages.text: En la Extensión no hay guerreros más expertos y resistentes que los hijos de Zarkov. La Hermandad del Vacío promete pagar generosamente por la posibilidad de reclutar zarkovianos para sus siniestros designios. Solo {mf|el|la} ungid{mf|o|a} del Dios Emperador podría anular las leyes del Imperium para beneficiar a su protectorado de este modo.
languages.original_text: The Expanse has yet to see warriors as skilled and resilient as the sons and daughters of Zarkov. The Fellowship of the Void promises to pay handsomely for the chance to recruit Zarkovians to execute their dark designs. Who else but the God-Emperor's anointed has the power to override the Imperium's laws for the welfare of the protectorate?

traits.locale_text: En la Extensión no hay guerreros más expertos y resistentes que los hijos de Zarkov. La Hermandad del Vacío promete pagar generosamente por la posibilidad de reclutar zarkovianos para sus siniestros designios. Solo {mf|el|la} ungid{mf|o|a} del Dios Emperador podría anular las leyes del Imperium para beneficiar a su protectorado de este modo.

languages.text: 放眼整个扩区，也找不出比扎尔科夫儿女更骁勇善战、坚韧不拔的战士。虚空协联承诺，只要能招募到扎尔科夫人去执行他们的那些黑暗计划，就愿意支付丰厚报酬。然而除了神皇的神选者，还有谁有资格为了属地的福祉而凌驾于帝国法律之上？
languages.original_text: The Expanse has yet to see warriors as skilled and resilient as the sons and daughters of Zarkov. The Fellowship of the Void promises to pay handsomely for the chance to recruit Zarkovians to execute their dark designs. Who else but the God-Emperor's anointed has the power to override the Imperium's laws for the welfare of the protectorate?

traits.locale_text: 放眼整个扩区，也找不出比扎尔科夫儿女更骁勇善战、坚韧不拔的战士。虚空协联承诺，只要能招募到扎尔科夫人去执行他们的那些黑暗计划，就愿意支付丰厚报酬。然而除了神皇的神选者，还有谁有资格为了属地的福祉而凌驾于帝国法律之上？

languages.text: Les Étendues n'ont encore jamais vu de guerriers aussi compétents et résilients que les fils et les filles de Zarkov. La Communauté du vide a promis une coquette somme aux Zarkoviens qui seraient prêts à mettre en œuvre ses sombres desseins. Qui d'autre que {mf|l'élu|l'élue} de l'Empereur-Dieu lui-même a le pouvoir d'ignorer les lois de l'Imperium pour le bien du protectorat ?
languages.original_text: The Expanse has yet to see warriors as skilled and resilient as the sons and daughters of Zarkov. The Fellowship of the Void promises to pay handsomely for the chance to recruit Zarkovians to execute their dark designs. Who else but the God-Emperor's anointed has the power to override the Imperium's laws for the welfare of the protectorate?

traits.locale_text: Les Étendues n'ont encore jamais vu de guerriers aussi compétents et résilients que les fils et les filles de Zarkov. La Communauté du vide a promis une coquette somme aux Zarkoviens qui seraient prêts à mettre en œuvre ses sombres desseins. Qui d'autre que {mf|l'élu|l'élue} de l'Empereur-Dieu lui-même a le pouvoir d'ignorer les lois de l'Imperium pour le bien du protectorat ?

languages.text: Enginlik, henüz Zarkov'un oğulları ve kızları kadar yetenekli ve dirençli savaşçılar görmedi. Uçsuz Kardeşliği, karanlık tasarılarını gerçekleştirmek üzere Zarkovluları görevlendirme fırsatına karşılık yüklü miktarda ödeme yapmayı vadediyor. Tanrı İmparator'un seçilimişinden başka kim protektoranın refahı için İmparatorluk yasalarını çiğneme gücüne sahiptir ki?
languages.original_text: The Expanse has yet to see warriors as skilled and resilient as the sons and daughters of Zarkov. The Fellowship of the Void promises to pay handsomely for the chance to recruit Zarkovians to execute their dark designs. Who else but the God-Emperor's anointed has the power to override the Imperium's laws for the welfare of the protectorate?

traits.locale_text: Enginlik, henüz Zarkov'un oğulları ve kızları kadar yetenekli ve dirençli savaşçılar görmedi. Uçsuz Kardeşliği, karanlık tasarılarını gerçekleştirmek üzere Zarkovluları görevlendirme fırsatına karşılık yüklü miktarda ödeme yapmayı vadediyor. Tanrı İmparator'un seçilimişinden başka kim protektoranın refahı için İmparatorluk yasalarını çiğneme gücüne sahiptir ki?

languages.text: 「コロヌス・エクスパンスは、ザルコフの息子たち、娘たちほど熟練し、不屈の戦士をいまだ目にしたことがない。虚無の連盟は、ザルコフ人を雇い入れ、その暗き企てを遂行させる機会のために、惜しみなく報酬を支払うと約束している。保護領の福祉のために帝国の法を覆す力を持つ者が、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}の聖別を受けし者のほかに、いったい誰かいようか？」
languages.original_text: The Expanse has yet to see warriors as skilled and resilient as the sons and daughters of Zarkov. The Fellowship of the Void promises to pay handsomely for the chance to recruit Zarkovians to execute their dark designs. Who else but the God-Emperor's anointed has the power to override the Imperium's laws for the welfare of the protectorate?

traits.locale_text: 「コロヌス・エクスパンスは、ザルコフの息子たち、娘たちほど熟練し、不屈の戦士をいまだ目にしたことがない。虚無の連盟は、ザルコフ人を雇い入れ、その暗き企てを遂行させる機会のために、惜しみなく報酬を支払うと約束している。保護領の福祉のために帝国の法を覆す力を持つ者が、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}の聖別を受けし者のほかに、いったい誰かいようか？」

languages.text: Die Ausdehnung hat noch keine Krieger gesehen, die so geschickt und robust sind wie die Schwestern von Zarkov. Die Gefährten der Leere versprechen, eine stattliche Summe zu bezahlen, wenn sie für die Umsetzung ihrer dunklen Pläne Zarkovianer rekrutieren können. Wer außer {mf|dem|der} Gesalbten des Gottimperators hat die Macht, die Gesetze des Imperiums zum Wohl des Protektorats zu übergehen?
languages.original_text: The Expanse has yet to see warriors as skilled and resilient as the sons and daughters of Zarkov. The Fellowship of the Void promises to pay handsomely for the chance to recruit Zarkovians to execute their dark designs. Who else but the God-Emperor's anointed has the power to override the Imperium's laws for the welfare of the protectorate?

traits.locale_text: Die Ausdehnung hat noch keine Krieger gesehen, die so geschickt und robust sind wie die Schwestern von Zarkov. Die Gefährten der Leere versprechen, eine stattliche Summe zu bezahlen, wenn sie für die Umsetzung ihrer dunklen Pläne Zarkovianer rekrutieren können. Wer außer {mf|dem|der} Gesalbten des Gottimperators hat die Macht, die Gesetze des Imperiums zum Wohl des Protektorats zu übergehen?
